commands.review_summary:
The PR caches private oversized-transcript string/null field regexes in `src/gateway/session-utils.fs.ts` instead of constructing them on each helper call.

PR surface: Source +25. Total +25 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the performance target by source inspection: current main constructs fresh regexes in the private helpers and calls them several times for each oversized transcript line. I did not rerun the benchmark in this read-only review.
